steps.title: Use the doubling factor
steps.content:
The function is
$$f(t)=24{,}000(2)^{\frac{t}{360}}$$
The population doubles when the factor $2^{\frac{t}{360}}$ becomes $2^1$.

steps.title: Solve for the time
steps.content: Set the exponent equal to $1$: $$\frac{t}{360}=1$$ $$t=360$$ This is the number of minutes needed to double. The answer is B.
